name: mave-wordpress
description: WordPress plugin for uploading and embedding Mave videos.

scripts.build:zip: npm run sync:dist && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/mave-video-$npm_package_version.zip && cd .dist && zip -qr ../dist/mave-video-$npm_package_version.zip mave-video
scripts.plugin-check:install: wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin install plugin-check --activate --force
scripts.plugin-check: npm run build:zip && npm run sync:wp-env && npm run plugin-check:stage-zip && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json start && npm run plugin-check:install && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin install wp-content/plugins/mave-wordpress/dist/mave-video-$npm_package_version.zip --force && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin check mave-video --require=wp-content/plugins/plugin-check/cli.php --categories=plugin_repo
scripts.plugin-check:json: npm run build:zip && npm run sync:wp-env && npm run plugin-check:stage-zip && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json start && npm run plugin-check:install && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin install wp-content/plugins/mave-wordpress/dist/mave-video-$npm_package_version.zip --force && wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin check mave-video --require=wp-content/plugins/plugin-check/cli.php --categories=plugin_repo --format=strict-json
scripts.plugin-check:list: wp-env --config .wp-env.plugin-check.json run cli wp plugin list-checks --require=wp-content/plugins/plugin-check/cli.php --categories --format=table
scripts.docker:plugin:list: wp-env run cli wp plugin list
scripts.docker:plugin:activate: wp-env run cli wp plugin activate mave-wordpress
